house_cusps.signification: Self, personality, physical body, appearance, health, beginning of life.
Wealth, family, speech, primary education, food, assets, face.
Courage, short travels, siblings, communication, writing, efforts, hands.
Mother, home, happiness, vehicle, lands, emotions, heart, inner peace.
Intellect, children, creativity, past life merits (Purvapunya), romance, speculation.
Debts, enemies, diseases, service, daily routine, competition, obstacles.
Spouse, partnership, business partners, relationship, travel, public life.
Longevity, secrets, inheritance, sudden transformations, occult, mysteries.
Dharma, fortune (Bhagya), father, higher education, long journeys, philosophy, religion.
Career, status, reputation, public life, authority, karma, actions in society.
Gains, desires fulfillment, friends, elder siblings, cash flow, achievements.
Losses, liberation (Moksha), foreign travels, isolation, dreams, bedroom pleasures.

conjunctions: Mercury & Saturn & Venus conjunct in House 12

yogas.name: Hamsa Yoga
yogas.meaning: Jupiter is strong in a Kendra house. Wisdom, spiritual alignment, high virtues, happiness, respected in society.
